title: Ageless: The New Science of Getting Older Without Getting Old
excerpt: A computational biologist makes the case that aging is not an inevitable decline but a treatable biological process—and that the science to slow or reverse it is closer than we think. Structured around the nine hallmarks of aging.
rationale: Root book #3 for longevity-research-and-aging. Ageless provides the most comprehensive and scientifically rigorous popular overview of the hallmarks of aging, serving as an essential companion to Outlive (practical protocol) and The Telomere Effect (cellular mechanism focus).
